chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No.D-4306 of 2014 ______________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S). ____________________________________________________________ Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Sher Rehman............... Petitioner V E R S U S The Federation of Pakistan & others.............. Respondents Date of hearing 19.12.2016 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zubair Zia Siddiqui, Advocate for PQA. Shaikh Liaqat Hussain, Standing Counsel. --------------------------------- The petitioner has approached this Court for some correction in his date of birth in the record of Port Qasim Authority but during pendency of this petition, he has been retired from service. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is not in his contact, while the counsel for the PQA submitted some documents to show that the petitioner has accepted pensionary benefits and other retirement dues in terms of impugned retirement letter without any protest. The copies of documents through which the payment was made is also attached with the letter of Port Qasim Authority dated 28.04.2016. In view of these papers, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
